A test command

Usage: test [OPTIONS] ARGS...

Options:

  -c  --count    int     A much longer usage description here    (env: $MYTOOL_COUNT)
  -f  --force    bool    Force something                         (env: $MYTOOL_FORCE)
  -h  --help     bool    Show help for test                      
  -n  --name     string  Name                                    (env: $MYTOOL_NAME)
  -V  --version  bool    Show version info for test
